questions.question: Explain the key characteristics of serverless computing.
Compare and contrast serverless computing with traditional container-based approaches, discussing advantages and limitations of each.
keyPoints: Definition of serverless computing and its key features
Definition of container-based approaches and their characteristics
Advantages of serverless: no infrastructure management, automatic scaling, cost efficiency
Advantages of containers: more control, portability, better for long-running processes
Limitations of serverless: cold start latency, execution time limits
Limitations of containers: requires more management, higher fixed costs
Appropriate use cases for each approach
